title: Conduit Price in Pakistan 2026 — PVC, GI & Flexible Conduit, Fittings & Cable Management Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: Conduit price in Pakistan 2026: PVC conduit 20mm Rs. 45–140/m, GI conduit 20mm Rs. 110–320/m, flexible conduit 20mm Rs. 90–180/m. 5 price tables: PVC (16mm–63mm), GI (16mm–50mm), flexible (16mm–50mm), conduit fittings (bends/junctions/couplings/saddles), and conduit tools. Pakistan-specific guidance: UV/heat degradation of standard PVC in 45–50°C summers, WAPDA commercial metering GI requirement, load-shedding thermal cycling expansion stress, flexible conduit at motor terminal boxes, and 35% fill-ratio rule for Pakistan thermal conditions. FAQPage schema. Cross-links: Cable Tray, Cable Gland, Terminal Block, VFD, MCB guides.
author: CNC Electric Pakistan
